bullet casings repurposed as decoration on hat band and belt
lean sun-blasted frame dusted head to toe in pale alkali
calm precise gunfighter stance amid a rusted ghost-town backdrop

label: Road Warrior Outrider
prompt_fragments: studded leather jacket over a patchwork armoured vest
chopped motorcycle helmet strapped to a saddlebag
crossbow and bolt quiver alongside a sawn-off carbine
tribal war paint and ritual scarification on exposed arms
dusty bandana and cracked flight goggles as face cover
